selected_candidate: Add continuation_contract_reason to AO Command readback and its command_timeline_binding.
alternatives_rejected: Leave Command to infer the reason from exact_next_action; rejected because exact action text is not a stable contract.
Only add the top-level field; rejected because Command timeline binding is the compact readback used by closure reconciliation.
Only update schema; rejected because generated Command artifacts and closure validation also needed the binding.
decision: Generate, validate, schema-bind, and production-readiness assert Command continuation_contract_reason.
